prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo system for the K20C1 (2.0L VTEC Turbo) featuring a Garrett GT3076R Gen II turbocharger with a 0.82 A/R turbine housing, custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe with 200-cell catalytic converter delete, and a PRL Motorsports intercooler upgrade with a 5.5-inch core thickness for reduced intake temps under sustained 35+ psi boost levels

Custom Hondata KPro V4 ECU reflash with a bespoke 3000+ RPM launch control map, optimized for E85 flex-fuel (up to 50% ethanol blend) with revised ignition timing (-3° to -5° at peak torque) and fuel injector scaling for Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors (2200cc/min) to support 600+ WHP on stock internals with forged pistons

Full suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (FL5-specific valving), Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable), and Hardrace front/rear camber arms with spherical bearings for -3.5° front and -2.8° rear camber, paired with a Cusco 2-point front strut tower brace and a custom rear subframe brace for chassis rigidity under 1.5G lateral loads
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (FL5-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a 3-piece GT-style rear wing (adjustable angle up to 15°), finished in a custom 3M Matte Hyper Blue with gloss black accents and exposed carbon weave on the hood and roof

Full titanium exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Ti, featuring a 3.5-inch titanium piping with a quad 4.5-inch titanium tips (burnt blue finish), paired with a custom titanium rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon for improved rear downforce at high speeds

Custom interior by Recaro with SPG XL seats (red Alcantara with black leather bolsters) wrapped in Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip), and a full carbon fiber dashboard overlay by 3D Carbon, including a custom digital gauge cluster by AIM MXS Strada (1.3-inch OLED display) for real-time boost, oil temp, and ethanol content monitoring
